title: About the Canada Student Financial Assistance Program - Canada.ca
content:
## About the Canada Student Financial Assistance Program
The Canada Student Financial Assistance Program (CSFA Program) provides Canada Student Grants and Loans to help students pay for their post-secondary education.
The  Program works in partnership with provinces and territories to deliver student aid . Funding is available to full- and part-time students that:
- are from low- and middle-income families
Apprentices can also get help through Canada  apprentice loans and apprenticeship  grants .
- Contact the Canada Student Financial Assistance Program
- Canada  Student Financial Assistance Program - Reports and statistics
